rule_d_isolation: triage agent is different subagent_type from the 9 R18 code-reviewer agents

release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: white-box test demerit semantically inverted across all 3 languages: 'cannot find program errors' is the exact opposite of what white-box testing does

evidence_excerpts.jp: プログラムの誤りを見つけられない
evidence_excerpts.en: Cannot find errors in the program

release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: Source-faithful Stage-5 (JP textbook source has imprecise wording; zh+en mirrored it). Net result = concept inversion for learners.
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Rewrite the cell across jp+zh+en. jp: '仕様自体の誤りや要求漏れは検出できない'; zh: '无法发现规格说明书本身的错误或需求遗漏'; en: 'Cannot detect specification errors or missing functionality (errors of omission)'

release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: JP cell has broken grammar (missing particle: 'すべての複雑なテストしないので'); zh has nested parens '（程序错误（Bug））'; en has singular/plural mismatch '(Bug)' for plural 'defects'. Source JP is broken; faithfully propagated to zh+en.

evidence_excerpts.jp: すべての複雑なテストしないので、発生頻度が低い不具合（バグ）が見つけられない可能性がある
evidence_excerpts.zh: 由于不进行所有复杂的测试，可能无法发现发生频率较低的缺陷（程序错误（Bug））
evidence_excerpts.en: Since not all complex tests are performed, there is a possibility that low-frequency defects (Bug) may not be found

release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: OCR or Stage-4/5 particle drop in JP source; Stage-5 literal pass-through to zh+en preserved the brokenness.
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Rewrite cell across jp+zh+en. jp: 'すべての分岐や条件を網羅的にテストするわけではないので、発生頻度が低い不具合（バグ）が見つけられない可能性がある'; zh: '由于无法穷举所有代码路径，可能漏掉低频触发的缺陷（Bug）'; en: 'Because it does not exercise every internal execution path, rarely triggered defects (bugs) may go undetected'

release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: term entity surface is a full sentence in all 3 languages; glossary indexing breaks and learners see a sentence where a term headword should be

evidence_excerpts.jp: 関数の呼び出し時に引数を指定すると、その引数が関数に渡されます。
evidence_excerpts.zh: 调用函数时指定参数，该参数会被传递给函数。
evidence_excerpts.en: When you specify an argument when calling a function, that argument is passed to the function.

release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: Stage-4 entity-boundary mis-extraction: a body paragraph was tagged as a term entity.
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Rewrite surface to a noun phrase in all 3 languages while keeping the definition (which is already paragraph-like and acceptable). jp: '引数を指定した関数の呼び出し'; zh: '带参数的函数调用'; en: 'Function call with arguments'. Note: there is also a section::p363::1 'Calling a Function with Arguments' on the same page — keep the term distinct or merge per planner judgment.

release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: term entity surface is a full sentence in all 3 languages (same pattern as F3)

evidence_excerpts.jp: コンピュータを区別する境界線が曖昧になっている
evidence_excerpts.zh: 区分计算机的边界正在变得模糊
evidence_excerpts.en: The Boundaries That Distinguish Computers Are Becoming Blurry

release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Rewrite surface to a noun phrase. jp: 'コンピュータ分類境界の曖昧化'; zh: '计算机分类边界的模糊化'; en: 'Blurring of Computer-Category Boundaries'. Definition can be kept as-is.

release_impacting_fixes.perspective_confidence: HIGH (cross-verified across 4 entities on same page + glossary)
release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: Same page uses 提案邀请书 in some entities and 提案请求书 in others for the same concept (RFP). Internal terminology drift on the exact page that teaches RFP.
release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: Stage-5 within-page consistency miss (two zh surfaces produced by LLM for what is the same JP concept).
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Normalize all 4 within-page zh occurrences + glossary RFP zh surface to '提案邀请书（RFP）' (matches mainland-PRC IT-vendor usage and the section title that already exists). Update term::p225::4 surface.zh and glossary g_RFP surface.zh.

release_impacting_fixes.entity_id: glossary entries for ハウジングサービス and ホスティングサービス
release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: Glossary maps both ハウジングサービス AND ホスティングサービス to the same zh surface '主机托管服务', collapsing the disambiguation that page 199 correctly draws (ハウジング = 主机托管服务 = own server on vendor premises; ホスティング = 主机租用服务 = vendor server rented). On exam this distinction is tested.

evidence_excerpts.glossary_hosting.surface.zh: 主机托管服务 (DEFECT — should be 主机租用服务)

release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: Glossary policy / Stage-5 polysemy collapse — two distinct JP concepts merged to one zh surface in glossary.
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Update glossary ホスティングサービス surface.zh from '主机托管服务' to '主机租用服务'. Keep ハウジングサービス as '主机托管服务'. Matches iter-4 F2 surgical-override pattern (g_524 流程→进程 case).

release_impacting_fixes.entity_id: itpassport_r6::term::p432::0 (差分バックアップ) + itpassport_r6::term::p432::1 (増分バックアップ)
release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: Differential and Incremental backup definitions say only 'newly added' data, but actual definitions include both 'added AND modified' data. Concept-correctness defect on an ITパスポート high-frequency exam topic.

evidence_excerpts.differential.jp: フルバックアップ以降、新たに追加されたデータをバックアップする
evidence_excerpts.differential.zh: 对完全备份之后新增的数据进行备份。
evidence_excerpts.differential.en: Backing up data that has been newly added since the full backup
evidence_excerpts.incremental.jp: 前回のバックアップから新たに追加されたデータのみをバックアップする
evidence_excerpts.incremental.zh: 仅备份自上次备份以来新增的数据。
evidence_excerpts.incremental.en: Backing up only the data that has been newly added since the previous backup

release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: Source-faithful Stage-5 mirror of JP under-specification.
release_impacting_fixes.severity_reclassification_note: Each individual reviewer marked WARN, but 5 perspectives flagging + concept-error on high-frequency exam topic → elevate to RELEASE_IMPACTING.
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Rewrite both definitions across jp+zh+en. 差分.jp: '前回のフルバックアップ以降に変更（追加・修正）されたすべてのデータをバックアップする方式'; 差分.zh: '备份自上次完全备份以来发生变化（新增或修改）的所有数据'; 差分.en: 'Backing up all data that has changed (added or modified) since the last full backup'. 増分.jp: '前回のバックアップ以降に変更（追加・修正）されたデータのみをバックアップする方式（前回は フル・差分・増分のいずれも含む）'; 増分.zh: '仅备份自上次备份（无论完全、差异或增量）以来发生变化（新增或修改）的数据'; 増分.en: 'Backing up only the data that has changed (added or modified) since the previous backup (full, differential, or incremental)'

release_impacting_fixes.entity_id: itpassport_r6::term::p327::0 (論理積) + ::1 (論理和) + ::2 (排他的論理和) + ::3 (否定)
release_impacting_fixes.perspective_confidence: HIGH (EDU-ZH × 4 explicit FAIL; EDU-EN INFO acknowledges same content-free issue on en side)
release_impacting_fixes.defect_summary: All 4 logical-operator term definitions in zh say only 'Japanese name for AND/OR/XOR/NOT operation' — zero teaching value to zh learner. Truth tables on same page partially salvage the lesson but term definitions remain release-impacting on the zh side.

evidence_excerpts.p327_0.definition.zh: 逻辑与（AND）运算的日语名称。
evidence_excerpts.p327_1.definition.zh: 逻辑或（OR）运算的日语名称。

release_impacting_fixes.root_cause: Stage-5 literally translated the JP-internal etymology comment ('日本語名称') into zh; framing is meaningless to a zh reader (who doesn't need to know the JP name for these primitives).
release_impacting_fixes.proposed_action: Replace definition.zh for each with truth-table semantics. 逻辑与: '两个布尔输入都为真（1）时输出真（1），否则输出假（0）的逻辑运算。日语称为「論理積」。'; 逻辑或: '两个布尔输入中至少有一个为真（1）时输出真（1），仅当两者都为假时输出假（0）的逻辑运算。日语称为「論理和」。'; 异或: '两个布尔输入不同（一真一假）时输出真（1），相同时输出假（0）的逻辑运算（XOR）。日语称为「排他的論理和」。'; 否定: '将单个布尔输入反转的一元运算（0→1，1→0）。日语称为「否定」。'
